creator: will@physics.purdue.edu
text:
On Tue, Sep 19, 2000 at 09:06:42AM +0400, Denis Shaposhnikov wrote:
> I don't understand. I use uid = 70 from porters handbook.
> Anyway, ifmail-os can use any uid. It hasn't dependency on it. You
> only need to change UID variable in pkg/INSTALL. BTW, news/ifmail port use
> uid = 70 too.

The problem is that if you install two ports expecting different users
for their purposes you'll run into conflicts.  But if news/ifmail-os and
news/ifmail use the same username/uid that will be fine, as long as it
is SUPPOSED to be that way (assuming one installs both ports).

-- 
Will Andrews <will@physics.purdue.edu> <will@FreeBSD.org>
